description: IICP Intent URN Registry — authoritative list of defined intents. New intents require Protocol Steward sign-off.

intents.name: LLM Chat Completion
intents.description: Multi-turn chat completion using the messages array format (OpenAI-compatible).

intents.name: LLM Text Completion
intents.description: Single-turn text completion from a prompt string.

intents.name: Text Embedding
intents.description: Generate dense vector embedding(s) from input text.

intents.name: Code Lint and Analysis
intents.description: Static analysis and lint of code. Returns issues with severity and location.

intents.name: Code Optimization
intents.description: Suggest or apply optimizations to code.

intents.name: Research Summarization
intents.description: Summarize a long document or set of documents.

intents.name: Educational Tutoring
intents.description: Provide tutoring, explanation, or guided problem-solving on a topic.

intents.name: Text Translation
intents.description: Translate text from one natural language to another.

intents.name: Text Classification (deprecated)
intents.description: Classify text into one or more categories from a provided set. DEPRECATED: use urn:iicp:intent:llm:classify:v1 for LLM-based classification with chain-of-thought support. This alias is retained for Phase 1 backward compatibility only.

intents.name: Multimodal Embedding
intents.description: Generate embeddings from mixed text and image inputs.

intents.name: MCP Tool Call
intents.description: Execute an MCP tool call through IICP transport. Reserved for the formal MCP binding so MCP-compatible tools can be addressed as mesh capabilities.

intents.name: LLM Summarization
intents.description: Summarize a document or long text into a condensed form. Part of the Cooperative Inference Profile (Phase 5).

intents.name: LLM Classification
intents.description: Classify text using an LLM with optional chain-of-thought. Complements urn:iicp:intent:classify:v1 which is label-only. Part of the Cooperative Inference Profile (Phase 5).

intents.name: LLM Reranking
intents.description: Rerank a list of candidate passages or results by relevance to a query using an LLM or cross-encoder. Part of the Cooperative Inference Profile (Phase 5).

intents.name: Audio Transcription (Speech-to-Text)
intents.description: Transcribe speech audio to text using OpenAI-compatible transcription payloads and Whisper-class backends. Audio is carried as base64 in the request and posted by SDKs as a multipart upload to compatible backends.

payload_schema.filename: string (optional, default audio.wav — hints the container/codec)
payload_schema.model: string (optional — backend default if absent; whisper.cpp ignores it)

intents.name: Text-to-Speech (Speech Synthesis)
intents.description: Synthesize speech audio from text using OpenAI-compatible speech payloads. The backend returns binary audio, and SDKs carry it back as base64 in result.audio for transport through the mesh.

payload_schema.voice: string (optional, default alloy — ignored by engines like espeak-ng)
payload_schema.response_format: string (optional: wav | mp3 | opus | flac | aac, backend-dependent)

intents.name: Content Moderation
intents.description: Classify text for policy-violating content using OpenAI-compatible moderation payloads or compatible safety classifiers. The request and response are plain JSON; the backend may supply its own fixed moderation model.

payload_schema.input: string or array of strings (text to moderate)
payload_schema.model: string (optional — backend supplies a fixed moderation model)

result_schema.results: array of {flagged: boolean, categories: {category: boolean}, category_scores: {category: float}}
